texto: Sometimes healthy and whole people make you long for your old, 'undepressed' self, and it is hard to smile when you just feel like sobbing your heart out. People are going out, you aren't. People are vacationing, you aren't. They are getting ahead in their careers, you aren't. They are partying, you aren't. Socializing reminds you of everything you have lost to depression.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Shubhrata Prakash: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Sometimes healthy and whole people make you long for your old, 'undepressed' self, and it is hard…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, vida, mental-illness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mental-illness.
